meaning: vi.绗﹀悎,鍗忚皟,閫氫俊,鐩稿綋,鐩稿簲
examples: Your account and hers do not correspond.
Your account of events does not correspond with hers.
Racegoers will be given a number which will correspond to a horse running in a race.
These consumer loyalty ratings correspond very highly with behavior and sales and market share.
The rebound in traffic as well as freer spending on New Years does correspond to this.
